basicInfo.title:
WRATH RELIEF
35% MILK CHOCOLATE WITH ASHWAGANDHA HERBS

features.title: THE POWER OF "ANCIENT CALM"
features.desc: In a world that never stops, Wrath Relief offers the "Pleasure of a Pause." By infusing premium milk chocolate with the stress-relieving properties of Ashwagandha, this bar is designed to help you unwind and reclaim your inner peace.

features.title: 20% ASHWAGANDHA ATIBALADI BLEND
features.desc: A functional wellness snack using a potent 20% concentration of an Atibaladi formulation. Includes Ashwagandha for stress management, Atibala for vitality, and a traditional infusion of Ghee and Honey for maximum absorption.

features.title: CREAMY 35% MILK CHOCOLATE
features.desc: The 80% chocolate base is crafted with 35% cocoa and rich milk solids. This luscious texture masks the earthy notes of Ashwagandha for a smooth, malt-like flavor profile.

features.title: "GOLD & TEXTURED BLUE" AESTHETICS
features.desc: Wrath Relief features a deep blue packaging chosen to evoke tranquility and relaxation—the perfect evening treat. It’s not just a snack; it’s a lifestyle upgrade for the modern soul.

features.title: SCIENCE-BACKED AYURVEDIC HERITAGE
features.desc: Developed at the Advanced Research Center (MUTBI) in Manipal, combining modern research with ancient wisdom to ensure every bar delivers both taste and function.

details.quality: We offer free standard shipping on all contiguous product. Transit times are displayed at checkout when selecting shipping options. 60 day free returns and return shipping for these two regions. We also ship to the rest of the world for a reasonable shipping surcharge.

featureGrid.title: ANCIENT HERBS
featureGrid.description: Infused with authentic Ayurvedic herbs like Ashwagandha, Brahmi, and Amla for targeted wellness.

featureGrid.title: PURE COCOA
featureGrid.description: Hand-selected premium cocoa for a rich, velvety texture and deep, satisfying chocolate experience.

featureGrid.title: ARTISAN CRAFTED
featureGrid.description: Small-batch production ensures maximum potency of herbs and artisanal quality in every bite.

basicInfo.title:
SMART SIN
35% MILK CHOCOLATE WITH BRAHMI HERBS

features.title: THE "INTELLECTUAL" INDULGENCE
features.desc: Smart Sin is not just a chocolate; it's a cognitive-enhancing functional snack. By pairing creamy 35% Milk Chocolate with the memory-boosting power of Brahmi, we've created a treat that helps you stay sharp while satisfying your sweet tooth.

features.title: 15% BRAHMI GHRITA INFUSION
features.desc: Uses traditional Ayurvedic preparation of Brahmi Ghrita (herbalized Ghee) for superior bioavailability of the active compounds. Includes Brahmi, Shankhapushpi, Vacha, and Trikatu for comprehensive brain support.

features.title: SMOOTH 35% MILK CHOCOLATE
features.desc: The 60g bar is crafted with 35% cocoa solids and rich milk components to create a velvety texture that perfectly balances the earthy notes of the herbalized Ghrita.

features.title: "GOLD & TEXTURED RED" DESIGN
features.desc: Wrapped in a vibrant Gold and Textured Red packaging that symbolizes mental energy and clarity. A premium aesthetic that fits into your high-performance lifestyle.

features.title: FORMULATED AT MUTBI, MANIPAL
features.desc: Developed using advanced research methods to ensure the stability and potency of the Ayurvedic ingredients within the chocolate matrix.

details.quality: We offer free standard shipping on all contiguous product. Transit times are displayed at checkout when selecting shipping options. 60 day free returns and return shipping for these two regions. We also ship to the rest of the world for a reasonable shipping surcharge.

basicInfo.title:
SMART SIN
55% DARK CHOCOLATE WITH BRAHMI HERBS

features.title: THE "INTELLECTUAL" INDULGENCE
features.desc: The Smart Sin Dark edition is designed for those who demand more from their snacks. By pairing the intense, antioxidant-rich profile of 55% Dark Chocolate with the cognitive-enhancing "Wisdom of Brahmi," we’ve created a bar that fuels focus and satisfies the palate—entirely without guilt.

features.title: 15% BRAHMI GHRITA (THE COGNITIVE GOLD)
features.desc: At the heart of this bar is a 15% concentration of Brahmi Ghrita, a traditional Ayurvedic preparation where herbs are infused into Cow Ghee for maximum absorption. Includes memory-enhancing Brahmi, concentration-boosting Shankhapushpi & Vacha, and metabolic-supporting Trikatu.

features.title: SOPHISTICATED 55% DARK COCOA BASE
features.desc: Our dark chocolate base is crafted for a smooth, bittersweet experience. The natural acidity and deep notes of the cocoa mass elegantly mask the herbal profile of the Ghrita, resulting in a rich, velvety finish that lingers.

features.title: COMMAND ATTENTION WITH "GOLD & TEXTURED RED"
features.desc: Dressed in a striking Gold and Textured Red wrapper, this bar symbolizes the "Agni" (fire) of the intellect. The vibrant red aesthetic is designed to stand out, signaling energy, focus, and superior quality.

features.title: PRECISION CRAFTING IN MANIPAL
features.desc: Each 60g slab is produced by Cacobean Chocolate Factory at the Advanced Research Center (MUTBI), Manipal. Our process ensures that the heat-sensitive Ayurvedic compounds remain potent.

specs.title: Dietary Info
specs.desc: Contains Soy; May contain traces of Milk

basicInfo.title:
HOLY SIN
35% MILK CHOCOLATE WITH CHYAWANPRASH HERBS

features.title: THE PERFECT FUSION: ANCIENT HERBS MEET MODERN LUXURY
features.desc: Experience the "Holy Sin"—the unapologetic combination of indulgent 35% Milk Chocolate and the time-honored wellness of Ayurvedic Chyawanprash. It’s the ultimate guilt-free pleasure that bridges the gap between traditional health and contemporary taste.

features.title: RICH 35% MILK CHOCOLATE BASE
features.desc: Crafted with a premium milk chocolate slab, our recipe uses high-quality cocoa butter and milk solids to ensure a velvety, smooth melt-in-your-mouth texture that balances the bold notes of the herbal infusion.

features.title: 25% PURE CHYAWANPRASH INFUSION
features.desc: Unlike "flavored" chocolates, we incorporate a significant 25% of authentic Chyawanprash. This includes the potent benefits of Amla (Natural Vitamin C), Honey & Ghee (Natural sweetness and healthy fats), and Pippali & Traditional Herbs (Supports immunity and vitality).

features.title: ARTISAN "RAW RADICLES" QUALITY
features.desc: Produced at the Cacobean Chocolate Factory, our bars are crafted with precision. We use natural vanilla flavor and high-grade emulsifiers to ensure a consistent, premium snap and gloss in every 60g bar.

features.title: CLEAN & TRANSPARENT INGREDIENTS
features.desc: We believe in full transparency. Our labels clearly list all ingredients—from the cocoa mass to the specific Ayurvedic herbs—ensuring you know exactly what you are consuming. Contains Milk and Soy. Gluten-free ingredients.

features.title: PREMIUM "GOLD & GREEN" PACKAGING
features.desc: Designed to reflect the product's identity, the packaging features a striking Gold and Textured Green aesthetic. It’s not just a chocolate bar; it’s a premium gift for the health-conscious connoisseur.

details.quality: We offer free standard shipping on all contiguous product. Transit times are displayed at checkout when selecting shipping options.  60 day free returns and return shipping for these two regions. We also ship to the rest of the world for a reasonable shipping surcharge.

basicInfo.title:
HOLY SIN
55% DARK CHOCOLATE WITH CHYAWANPRASH HERBS

features.title: THE BOLD "HOLY SIN" EXPERIENCE
features.desc: Indulge in the intense, bittersweet world of 55% Dark Chocolate fused with the potent power of ancient Ayurvedic herbs. This bar is for those who seek the "Sin of Pleasure" through rich cocoa and the "Holiness" of immunity-boosting Chyawanprash—all in one bite.

features.title: PREMIUM 55% DARK COCOA BASE
features.desc: Crafted for the sophisticated palate, our dark chocolate slab features a 55% cocoa solids composition. It offers a deep, complex flavor profile with a smooth finish, perfectly complementing the earthy, spicy undertones of the herbal infusion.

features.title: 25% PURE AYURVEDIC CHYAWANPRASH
features.desc: We don't just flavor our chocolate; we fortify it. Each bar contains 25% authentic Chyawanprash, bringing you the functional benefits of Amla (Antioxidant powerhouse), Traditional Herbs (Supports wellness), and Ghee/Honey (Traditional vitality).

features.title: VEGAN-FRIENDLY DARK SELECTION
features.desc: Our Dark Chocolate formulation is naturally focused on cocoa mass and cocoa butter. While it is processed in a facility that handles milk, the 55% Dark variant is the ideal choice for those looking for a more intense, plant-forward indulgence.

features.title: ARTISAN MANIPAL CRAFTSMANSHIP
features.desc: Produced at the Cacobean Chocolate Factory within the Advanced Research Center (MUTBI), Manipal. Our process ensures that the heat-sensitive properties of the Chyawanprash herbs are preserved during the chocolate tempering process.

features.title: LUXURY "GOLD & TEXTURED GREEN" BRANDING
features.desc: The packaging reflects the duality of the product—Gold for the premium "sinful" chocolate and Textured Green for the "holy" herbal roots. It is a standout addition to any premium e-commerce shelf or gift hamper.

specs.title: Dietary Info
specs.desc: Contains Soy; May contain traces of Milk
